title: UK-Switzerland deal to scrap roaming charges and allow Britons to use e-gates
summary_full: The UK signs a new services deal with Switzerland it says will increase exports by £5.2bn annually "in the long run".
summary_public: The UK signs a new services deal with Switzerland it says will increase exports by £5.2bn annually "in the long run".
